backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend placeholder; no logic is implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the 'Confirm Payment Received' button in OrderForm triggers a full page reload, with high confidence and a reference to REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for a warm color palette in both light and dark modes using the OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Welcome to SUMOJI', links a custom favicon, and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages order state and renders Hero, Menu, OrderForm, and Footer sections along with a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying SUMOJI branding, a DKI Jakarta address, a WhatsApp contact link with a green icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dim sum background image, SUMOJI branding, 'Steam. Snap. Repeat.' tagline, and an 'Order Now' button that smooth-scrolls to the menu.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering three dim sum items (Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, Party Pack 50pcs) with ingredient checkboxes, quantity controls, and add-to-order functionality.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Order form with cart summary, contact input, and a two-step flow that shows a QRIS QR code after order confirmation; confirming payment marks the order paid and reloads the page after 1.5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentTimer.ts: Manages a countdown timer for active orders stored in localStorage, tracking payment status (pending/paid/expired) and exposing formatted time remaining.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no implementation, noting that all order data is stored locally in the browser.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for a warm red/gold dim sum theme with light and dark mode variables.
frontend/src/lib/formatCurrency.ts: Utility function that formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah currency string (e.g., 'Rp. 17.500,-').
frontend/src/lib/formatWhatsAppMessage.t: Formats order items, total price, and customer details into a WhatsApp-ready message string for the SUMOJI Dim Sum ordering flow.
frontend/src/lib/openWhatsApp.ts: Opens a WhatsApp chat with a hardcoded business number by constructing and navigating to a wa.me URL with an encoded message.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration mapping OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extending theme with custom border radius, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking an existing feature and a pending action request to trigger a full page reload after payment confirmation in the OrderForm component.
